controls: Aureon used local ledger, Drive and local evidence only; no unsupported eligibility, partner, budget, finance, permit, facility, asset, academic, farming, hardware or public-sector claim was made.
Private bank, tax and account-level details observed in broad Drive materials were not copied into the formal IFS refresh artifact.
No IFS portal mutation, external email, upload, partner invite, award terms acceptance or final submission was performed in this refresh.
Submitted IFS applications remain monitor-only; live UK-Switzerland draft remains evidence-gated.
next_actions: Use the prepared evidence request PDF packs to collect partner/lead/budget evidence before any further IFS portal mutation.
If a partner response or signed budget arrives, add it to the source evidence index and rerun the route unlock audit before changing any route to submit-ready.
Keep submitted IFS applications on track-status monitoring only.
